notes: Curated output of the competitor keyword gap audit 2026-06-11 (report: ~/waves-competitor-keyword-gap-audit-2026-06-11.md). Every topic verified: competitor ranks top-20 in DataForSEO Labs US database, Waves has no top-30 rank, no covering sitemap page, zero/trace GSC impressions. Scores are operator priority order — all clear the 45 blog floor; palmetto cluster first. Topics deliberately EXCLUDE optimize-existing candidates (house centipedes, fruit flies, no-see-ums, mosquito repellent — existing pages cover those) and competitor-brand comparison pages (operator-authored lane).
